usage: Resumed after restart. Working deliberately per Lucas feedback; committing + updating status each phase so cap reset / restart stays clean.

resume.how: Run `claude --resume`. /goal Stop-hook drives remaining phases. Del 0-3 committed + tsc exit 0.

del3_notes: src/lib/queue.ts: shared QueueDraft schema + readQueue/writeQueue/appendDrafts/updateDraft (fs, .send_queue/approval_queue.json). Imported by BOTH the API route and the Del 4 engine — one schema, no drift.

src/app/api/approve/queue/route.ts: GET returns drafts; POST {id,action:approve|edit|reject}. 'approve' only marks status=approved (NO mail sent). 'edit' re-validates via validateDraft and 422s on price/robot-CTA violations.

src/app/approve/page.tsx: client component, impeccable-designed review-stack (not card grid per PRODUCT.md). Light theme, Fraunces headings, status pills, inline edit, demo links, empty state shows engine command.
